feed.title: Roast our real-time Bitcoin explorer built for everyday Bitcoin users

entry.title: Roast our real-time Bitcoin explorer built for everyday Bitcoin users
entry.summary:
The timing prediction for the next blockchain block is often misunderstood. It is crucial to recognize that the time until the next block is not a simple countdown from the last block, but instead follows an exponential distribution. This characteristic means that the distribution is memoryless, making the expected time to the next block consistently 10 minutes regardless of when the previous block occurred.
This concept emphasizes that the expected duration until the next block does not shorten based on the time elapsed since the last block was found. Each new minute does not decrease the expected remaining time to the next block; it remains at a constant 10 minutes. Understanding this helps in accurately assessing waiting times and can influence strategies around transactions and block creation in blockchain technology.
